text: shift + click another aim when one is selected should select the connection from selected to clicked

status.comment: Verified not implemented 2026-06-27. Aim.vue onAimClick (line 57/64) emits 'aim-clicked' with only the aim id and ignores keyboard modifiers; shiftKey is only handled for keyboard nav in keyboard-actions.ts, not for clicks. Work: have the aim click carry event.shiftKey and, when an aim is already selected, create/select the connection selected→clicked instead of changing selection.
